other_observers: Al Kogler, Maggie Kogler; Connie Kogler
specific_location: Campsite #12 in Tunnel Campground, County Rd.103/ Laramie River Road.
description: A large very dark green hummingbird. Looked twice the size of the female and juvenile Broad-tailed that were visiting the feeder. Bill long and straight. Wings slightly beyond tip of tail. Grayish below with hints of gray-dot striping on throat.Behaviors: Came into a hummingbird feeder hanging in a ponderosa pine tree. Not aggressive, easily chased off by other hummers. Fed at feeder several times. Was seen about 4-5 times during a one and a half hour time period.Call: Not heardPlumage: Adult Female
photographer: Photographer: Connie Kogler, Connie Kogler, Connie Kogler
